name: historical_notes
Siege of Avaricum: Compressed Avaricum siege: Caesar's siege terrace and towers press the single dry western approach while the Bituriges garrison relies on walls marsh and river defenses.

name: ROMAN
column4: advance the siege terrace methodically and commit the legions through the single dry approach
column5: breach the oppidum before supply shortages force the siege to end

name: GALLIC
column4: hold the headland walls and punish any Roman unit caught in the marsh fringed approach
column5: delay the assault and deny Caesar a quick capture of Avaricum
